language: class Solution { public int subarrayXor(int[] arr) { int n=arr.length; int xor=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ int freq=(((i-0)*(n-i))+(n-i)); if(freq%2!=0) xor^=arr[i]; } return xor; } }
problemTitle: class Solution { public: int subarrayXor(vector<int>& arr) { int ans = 0 , n = arr.size(); for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++){ int x = i , y = n - i + 1; int num = arr[i - 1]; if((x & 1) + (y & 1) == 2) ans ^= num; } return ans; }};
